query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `skillLearningHistory` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `sourceType` enum('tour','batch','scheduled','manual') NOT NULL,
  `sourceTourIds` text,
  `keywordSuggestions` text,
  `newSkillSuggestions` text,
  `identifiedTags` text,
  `totalKeywordsFound` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `newKeywordsFound` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `suggestionsAccepted` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `suggestionsRejected` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `skillsCreated` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `processingTimeMs` int,
  `status` enum('pending','processing','completed','failed','partial') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `errorMessage` text,
  `triggeredBy` enum('user','schedule','system') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user',
  `triggeredByUserId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `completedAt` timestamp,
  CONSTRAINT `skillLearningHistory_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

  `triggeredBy` enum('user','schedule','system') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user',
  `triggeredByUserId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `completedAt` timestamp,
  CONSTRAINT `skillLearningHistory_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
